---
title: "create_n100.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/create_n100.py"
loc: 9
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.63
style_score: 9.27
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 6.62
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating internal logic.

## Interaction Protocol
Import module and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
